prompt: A realistic first-person horror game screenshot set in a narrow, dimly lit Japanese apartment corridor at night, viewed from slightly behind a lone human figure standing in the hallway. The figure is a young woman with straight dark shoulder-length hair, seen mostly in silhouette from the back, wearing a dark hoodie and a backpack, facing forward toward the end of the corridor. The setting is an older concrete apartment building interior with glossy reflective floor tiles, stained off-white walls, multiple apartment doors on both sides, and a cold fluorescent ceiling light receding into the distance. One apartment door on the right side is slightly open, emitting a vivid supernatural purple glow that spills into the hallway and creates rippling light patterns across the wall and floor. On the left foreground, include 2 beverage vending machines with illuminated rows of drinks. Also on the left wall, place a black sign with large Japanese text reading "事故物件", smaller text beneath, and a visible QR code. On the right wall, include a bulletin board and 4 posted notices: a warning-style poster with large red Japanese text, a dense text notice, a moving-service flyer with bold red text and phone numbers, and a vertical anti-crime sign. At the lower right, place a small magazine rack or stand holding several pamphlets, with the front magazine showing Japanese text including "月刊オカルト". Through the far end of the corridor, show a balcony railing and distant city lights. Add an in-game HUD overlay to make it look like a captured indie horror game screen: top left mission text in Japanese with 2 lines, including a green progress counter "2/5"; top right a digital time display "23:47" and date "2024/04/11"; bottom left a camcorder interface with Japanese text, a red recording dot, "4K", and "60FPS"; bottom right green Japanese collection text and a row of 4 inventory slots with only 2 occupied icons. Cinematic composition, moody shadows, photorealistic textures, subtle film grain, surveillance-camera and found-footage atmosphere, ominous supernatural tension, purple and blue-black color palette, realistic Japanese typography, ultra-detailed indie survival horror aesthetic.
